name: Per-Page Example (template)
doc: Template for a per-page mood. Activate via [data-mood="per-page-example"] on any wrapper element rather than via the registry-level CLI. Cascades through every data-surface block in the wrapper subtree — page content, navbar, footer if they're inside the wrapper. See docs/architecture/per-page-moods.md for the full pattern.
notes: PARTIAL TOKEN DISCIPLINE: this template only overrides accent + font. Background, ink, cards, borders stay brand-default so the page still belongs to the surrounding visual identity.
Activation: add data-mood="per-page-example" to any wrapper element (route layout, page component, or single section).
If you find yourself overriding --bg or --ink on a per-page mood, ask twice — those are usually the foundation that holds the page on the rest of the site.
Brand-locked tokens (--brand-mark-primary, --brand-mark-secondary) cannot be overridden. Per-page logo variants ship as asset swaps (different SVG file when the path matches), not as token overrides.
